239b84f606fa7fdb.summary: Probability P(E) = favourable outcomes / total outcomes. Values: 0 ≤ P(E) ≤ 1. P(E)+P(not E)=1. Complementary events simplify 'at least one' problems: P(at least one)=1-P(none).

chunks.title: Understanding Probability - A Theoretical Approach
chunks.content:
**Probability - A Theoretical Approach** is a key concept in Probability of CBSE Class X Mathematics.

**Probability** measures how likely an event is to occur.

P(E) = Number of favourable outcomes / Total number of possible outcomes

**Properties:**
• 0 ≤ P(E) ≤ 1
• P(impossible) = 0, P(certain) = 1
• P(E) + P(not E) = 1
• ΣP(all outcomes) = 1

**Sample spaces:** 1 coin→2, 2 coins→4, 1 die→6, 2 dice→36, cards→52

**Key points to remember:**
• Probabilities always 0 to 1
• P(E)+P(not E)=1
• 'At least one' = 1-P(none)
• All outcomes equally likely in theoretical probability

chunks.title: Properties and Applications of Probability - A Theoretical Approach
chunks.content:
**1. Properties:**
• P(at least 1 head in 3 coins) = 1-P(no heads)=1-1/8=7/8
• P(king) = 4/52 = 1/13
• P(sum 7 with 2 dice) = 6/36 = 1/6
• P(face card) = 12/52 = 3/13

**2. Important Formulas:**
P(E) = fav/total
0 ≤ P(E) ≤ 1
P(E) + P(not E) = 1
P(at least one) = 1-P(none)

**3. Step-by-Step Approach:**
• Identify the given information
• Apply the appropriate formula
• Solve step by step
• Verify the answer

**4. Example:**
Bag: 3 red, 5 blue, 2 green. P(red)=3/10=0.3, P(not blue)=1-5/10=0.5.

chunks.title: Worked Example
chunks.content:
**Problem:** From a well-shuffled deck of 52 cards, find P(a king) and P(red face card).

**Solution:**

**Step 1:** P(king) = 4/52 = 1/13
**Step 2:** Red face cards: Hearts J,Q,K and Diamonds J,Q,K = 6
**Step 3:** P(red face) = 6/52 = 3/26

Therefore, P(king)=1/13, P(red face)=3/26.

chunks.title: Common Mistakes and Tips
chunks.content:
**Common Mistakes:**

❌ **P > 1:** Probability is always between 0 and 1

**Tips and Tricks:**

✓ **Fav/total:** Always: favourable / total possible

chunks.title: Practice Problems
chunks.content:
**Problem 1 (Basic):**
Toss 2 coins. Find P(2 heads).

**Answer:** Total=4. Fav=1. P=1/4.

---

**Problem 2 (Intermediate):**
A die rolled. Find P(even).

**Answer:** Even: 2,4,6. P=3/6=1/2.

---

**Problem 3 (Advanced):**
Bag: 4 white, 6 black, 5 red. Find P(not black).

**Answer:** Total=15. Not black=9. P=9/15=3/5.
